title: BEM-827 fix bad queue JSON
objective:
Run script:
"""
sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/workflow_dispatch_queue','governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/transport']:
    Path(d).mkdir(parents=True,exist_ok=True)
created='2026-05-21 | 22:26 (UTC+3)'
queue_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue')
invalid_dir=Path('governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid')
invalid=[]
valid=[]
for p in sorted(queue_dir.glob('*.json')):
    txt=p.read_text(errors='ignore')
    try:
        json.loads(txt)
        valid.append(str(p))
    except Exception as exc:
        bad=invalid_dir/(p.name+'.bad.txt')
        bad.write_text(txt+sep+'--- parse_error ---'+sep+str(exc)+sep)
        p.unlink()
        invalid.append({'path':str(p),'archived_as':str(bad),'error':str(exc)})
# Always create exactly one fresh valid Claude dispatch queue item after cleanup.
fresh=queue_dir/'bem827_claude_dispatch_retry_valid.json'
fresh.write_text(json.dumps({
    'schema_version':'workflow_dispatch_queue_item.v4',
    'workflow':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml',
    'workflow_id':'claude-internal-auditor-dispatcher.yml',
    'ref':'main',
    'inputs':{},
    'reason':'BEM-827 valid retry after removing malformed queue json',
    'created_at':created
},indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
# Patch shell processor so malformed JSON cannot kill the whole runner.
proc=Path('scripts/process_workflow_dispatch_queue.sh')
if proc.exists():
    proc.write_text('''#!/usr/bin/env bash\nset -euo pipefail\nmkdir -p governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/state governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid\nnow="$(date -u +%Y-%m-%dT%H:%M:%SZ)"\nprintf '{"status":"processor_started","time":"%s"}\\n' "$now" > governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json\ncount=0\nfor f in governance/workflow_dispatch_queue/*.json; do\n  [ -f "$f" ] || continue\n  count=$((count+1))\n  base="$(basename "$f" .json)"\n  out="governance/workflow_dispatch_results/${base}.status.json"\n  if ! python3 -m json.tool "$f" >/tmp/queue_item.json 2>/tmp/queue_item.err; then\n    cp "$f" "governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid/${base}.bad.json" || true\n    err="$(cat /tmp/queue_item.err | tr '\\n' ' ' | sed 's/"/'"'"'/g')"\n    printf '{"status":"invalid_json","queue_file":"%s","error":"%s","time":"%s"}\\n' "$f" "$err" "$now" > "$out"\n    rm -f "$f"\n    continue\n  fi\n  workflow="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get("workflow") or d.get("workflow_id") or d.get("file") or "")' "$f")"\n  ref="$(python3 -c 'import json,sys; d=json.load(open(sys.argv[1])); print(d.get("ref") or "main")' "$f")"\n  if [ -z "$workflow" ]; then\n    printf '{"status":"missing_workflow","queue_file":"%s","time":"%s"}\\n' "$f" "$now" > "$out"\n    rm -f "$f"\n    continue\n  fi\n  if [ -z "${GH_TOKEN:-}" ]; then\n    printf '{"status":"token_missing","queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\\n' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"\n    continue\n  fi\n  if gh workflow run "$workflow" --ref "$ref"; then\n    printf '{"status":"dispatch_attempted","exit_code":0,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\\n' "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"\n    rm -f "$f"\n  else\n    code=$?\n    printf '{"status":"dispatch_failed","exit_code":%s,"queue_file":"%s","workflow":"%s","ref":"%s","time":"%s"}\\n' "$code" "$f" "$workflow" "$ref" "$now" > "$out"\n  fi\ndone\necho "processed_queue_items=$count"\n''')
commit=Path('scripts/commit_workflow_dispatch_results.sh')
if commit.exists():
    ct=commit.read_text(errors='ignore')
    if 'governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid' not in ct:
        ct=ct.replace('governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json', 'governance/workflow_dispatch_results governance/state/workflow_dispatch_queue_processor_marker.json governance/workflow_dispatch_queue governance/workflow_dispatch_queue_invalid')
        commit.write_text(ct)
state={'bem':'BEM-827','status':'bad_queue_json_cleaned_and_processor_hardened','invalid_count':len(invalid),'invalid':invalid,'valid_before':valid,'fresh_queue_file':str(fresh),'created_at':created}
Path('governance/state/bem827_fix_bad_dispatch_queue_json.json').write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/reports/bem827_fix_bad_dispatch_queue_json.md').write_text('# BEM-827 | Fix Bad Dispatch Queue JSON | PASS'+sep+sep+json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md').write_text('Next: run fresh Codex tick and verify workflow_dispatch_results status. Operator relay forbidden.'+sep)
Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md').write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-827'+sep+sep+'Queue JSON cleaned. Processor hardened. Next: tick and verify dispatch result.'+sep)
with Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl').open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h: h.write(json.dumps(state,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
changed=['governance/state/bem827_fix_bad_dispatch_queue_json.json','governance/reports/bem827_fix_bad_dispatch_queue_json.md','governance/tasks/pending/bem827_next.md','governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md','governance/transport/results.jsonl',str(fresh)]
if proc.exists(): changed.append(str(proc))
if commit.exists(): changed.append(str(commit))
for item in invalid: changed.append(item['archived_as'])
changed_files.extend(changed)
ops_applied.append('Removed malformed dispatch queue JSON files, archived them, created one valid Claude dispatch queue item, and hardened the shell processor so invalid JSON cannot kill Codex Runner')
"""
No issue comments.
